overview: Naturopathic doctors treat hormone imbalances in men and women using bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT), GLP-1 therapies, peptides, and supplement plans. Treatment is customized based on saliva and blood hormone testing to address menopause, andropause, fatigue, weight gain, low libido, and fertility concerns.
targetAudience: Adults seeking hormone balancing through natural and bioidentical therapies.
